name: Marinated Barbecue Brisket
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds fresh beef brisket (up to 5 lbs)
recipeInstructions:
Serves 8 to 10
1. Place brisket on a large piece of heavy-duty aluminum foil.
2. Sprinkle tenderizer and seasonings on both sides of the meat.
3. Pour liquid smoke and Worcestershire sauce over top.
4. Cover and marinate in refrigerator for 6 to 10 hours or overnight.
5. Place foil-wrapped brisket in Crock-Pot, cutting it in half if necessary to fit easily.
6. Cover and cook on Low setting for 10 to 12 hours.
7. Chill brisket, then cut across the grain into thin slices.
8. Before serving, reheat in your favorite barbecue sauce.
